heroIntro: Romantic, timeless celebrations — tablescaping, backdrops, styling, balloon decor & audio guestbooks.
introHeading: Refined celebrations, designed down to the last detail
introBody: Based in Texas, Freya & Company styles weddings, showers, and intimate gatherings with a vintage, romantic sensibility and a touch of old-Hollywood glamour. Every detail is intentional — nothing left to chance.
quote: The details aren't the details. They are the celebration.
ctaBody: Tell us about your event and we'll craft a custom proposal — defined by detail.
